description: This file defines API routes for admin functions in a FastAPI application, including listing pending reviews, approving/rejecting reviews, and listing users.

classes.name: UserOut
classes.description: Schema for exposing user information in responses.

methods.name: list_pending_reviews( _admin_or_mod=Depends(require_role(UserRole.admin, UserRole.moderator)), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Lists all pending reviews for moderation.

methods.name: approve_review( review_id: str, _admin_or_mod=Depends(require_role(UserRole.admin, UserRole.moderator)), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Approves a specific review identified by review_id.

methods.name: reject_review( review_id: str, _admin_or_mod=Depends(require_role(UserRole.admin, UserRole.moderator)), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Rejects a specific review identified by review_id.

methods.name: list_users( _admin=Depends(require_role(UserRole.admin)), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Lists all users in the system.

ctags.name: approve_review
ctags.signature: ( review_id: str, _admin_or_mod=Depends(require_role(UserRole.admin, UserRole.moderator)), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: reject_review
ctags.signature: ( review_id: str, _admin_or_mod=Depends(require_role(UserRole.admin, UserRole.moderator)), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
